name: @platform/domain-core
description: Generic pure TypeScript domain-core package for enterprise policy, validation, and state-transition examples.

readme.summary: DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by no replacement required — unused id/timestamp/event helpers; use node:crypto randomUUID + Date.toISOString directly; do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Generic pure TypeScript domain-core package for enterprise policy, validation, and state-transition examples.
responsibilities: Own generic domain-core model, validation, and policy examples
Remain independent from React, GraphQL transport, and browser runtime concerns
Define generic entity and policy primitives shared by profile, access, ingestion, and analytics packages
nonResponsibilities: Does not encode a specific product-domain end state
Does not own PostgreSQL persistence, ClickHouse analytics, or identity-provider integration
usage: Import from feature and adapter mapping packages through public exports
Use in tests without browser runtime
operationalNotes: Domain-core proves architectural separation without assuming business purpose
